Interface IVector

Namespace
ESRI.ArcGIS.Geometry
Assembly
ESRI.Server.Geometry.dll

Provides access to vector properties and operations.

[InterfaceType(ComInterfaceType.InterfaceIsIUnknown)]
[Guid("40D717C9-10C2-11D4-9F59-00C04F6BDF0D")]
public interface IVector

Properties

ComponentByIndex[int]

The component corresponding to a given index.

double ComponentByIndex[int componentIndex] { get; set; }

componentIndex int

Property Value

double

Sample Snippet

Dimension

The dimension of this vector.

int Dimension { get; }

int

Examples

Sample Snippet

IsEmpty

Indicates if the vector is empty (unset).

bool IsEmpty { get; }

bool

Sample Snippet

Magnitude

The length of the vector.

double Magnitude { get; set; }

double

Normalize the vector (scale it to magnitude = 1).
